| pure-core:constant:src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:MAX_COMMAND_INPUT_EVENTS | MAX_COMMAND_INPUT_EVENTS | constant | pure-core | combat-rts-command-input | src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:65 | exported | export const MAX_COMMAND_INPUT_EVENTS | Hard cap on events in one command log. Derived from `COMMAND_TIMEOUT_TICKS_BASIS` (3600 = combat timeout ticks) × 16 commands/tick — a generous ceiling above any realistic player input rate, but still finite so a hostile `length` cannot force multi-gigabyte allocations. There is no tighter authoritative event budget in the RTS design yet. |
| pure-core:constant:src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:MAX_COMMAND_UNIT_IDS | MAX_COMMAND_UNIT_IDS | constant | pure-core | combat-rts-command-input | src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:74 | exported | export const MAX_COMMAND_UNIT_IDS | Hard cap on unitIds per command. Skirmish rosters and engagement tables are far smaller; 1024 is an explicit defensive bound so drag-select cannot be used as a length-DoS vector, and so `new Array(untrustedLength)` is never attempted with hostile values. |
| pure-core:constant:src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:MAX_COMMAND_UNIT_REFS_TOTAL | MAX_COMMAND_UNIT_REFS_TOTAL | constant | pure-core | combat-rts-command-input | src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:86 | exported | export const MAX_COMMAND_UNIT_REFS_TOTAL | Log-wide budget for unit-id slots across every event. Per-array caps alone still allow `MAX_COMMAND_INPUT_EVENTS × MAX_COMMAND_UNIT_IDS` (~59M) index reads and fresh array slots from a compact hostile Proxy. This cumulative budget is checked after each event's length is captured and *before* that event's copy is allocated. 64 full multi-selects (or many sin… |
| pure-core:constant:src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:MAX_COMMAND_ID_CHARS | MAX_COMMAND_ID_CHARS | constant | pure-core | combat-rts-command-input | src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:95 | exported | export const MAX_COMMAND_ID_CHARS | Max UTF-16 code units in one unitId or targetId. Real combatant ids are short labels (`knight`, `raider_3`). 128 is far above any authoritative id scheme in the repo and stops a single 64 KiB string from being accepted as an identifier. |
| pure-core:constant:src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:MAX_COMMAND_ID_CHARS_TOTAL | MAX_COMMAND_ID_CHARS_TOTAL | constant | pure-core | combat-rts-command-input | src/combatRtsCommandInputCore.ts:104 | exported | export const MAX_COMMAND_ID_CHARS_TOTAL | Log-wide budget for the sum of accepted identifier lengths (every unitId and every targetId). Slot caps alone still allow the same max-length string to be referenced on every slot (and every attack_target), so later JSON/replay serialization would expand into multi-GiB output. 256 KiB of id text is far above any real log and keeps the product bounded. |

| pure-core:function:src/npcRelationshipCore.ts:getEffectiveAffinity | getEffectiveAffinity | function | pure-core | npc-relationship | src/npcRelationshipCore.ts:198 | exported | export function getEffectiveAffinity( personal: NpcRelationshipMap, factionRelationships: NpcFactionRelationshipMap, factionCohesion: NpcFactionCohesionMap, registry: RelationshipRegistryLike, a: string, b: string ): number | 個人の絆(personal)に、派閥文脈(異派閥なら敵対/同盟、同派閥なら結束)を上乗せした 実効affinity。「実際に関わったことがある個人ペア」にのみ意味を持たせるため、 呼び出し側は relationships に既にキーがあるペアに対してのみ使うこと(全ペア総当りで 呼ぶと元のO(N^2)に戻ってしまう)。 |

| pure-core:function:src/npcRelationshipCore.ts:evolveRelationships | evolveRelationships | function | pure-core | npc-relationship | src/npcRelationshipCore.ts:336 | exported | export function evolveRelationships(input: RelationshipEvolveInput): RelationshipEvolveResult | 世界データから NPC 同士の関係を1tick進める(決定論)。 規則(v0): 1. 同席 — 同じ場所に居合わせるペアは少しずつ親密化(顔見知りに)。 2. 共通の危機 — 同じ reason で同tickに動いたペアは結束(危機の盟友)。 3. 派閥動態 — 紛争/critical イベント時、派閥そのものの関係(異派閥=険悪化/ 同派閥=結束)を動かす。個人ペアへは書き込まない(下記参照)。 全変化は clamp され、ペアごとに純増減 + 最大寄与の reason で1件に集約。 |
